from sqlmodel import Session, SQLModel, Field, create_engine, select
from typing import Optional


class Product(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    name: str
    category: str


class Order(SQLModel, table=True):
    id: Optional[int] = Field(default=None, primary_key=True)
    product_id: int
    quantity: int


engine = create_engine("postgresql://user:pass@localhost/mydb")


def enrich_orders(order_ids: list[int]) -> list[dict]:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        result = []
        for order_id in order_ids:
            order = session.get(Order, order_id)
            product = session.get(Product, order.product_id)
            result.append({
                "order_id": order.id,
                "product_name": product.name,
                "quantity": order.quantity,
            })
        return result


def find_related_products(product_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, list[str]]:
    with Session(engine) as session:
        related = {}
        for pid in product_ids:
            product = session.get(Product, pid)
            same_cat = session.exec(
                select(Product).where(Product.category == product.category)
            ).all()
            related[pid] = [p.name for p in same_cat]
        return related
